name: What should I ask before hiring someone to generate a knowledge graph for my team?

mainEntity.name: What should I ask before hiring someone to generate a knowledge graph for my team?

acceptedAnswer.text: You should ask for a data sample, a schema draft, a validation approach, and examples of how ambiguous entities are resolved. Those deliverables show whether the provider can move from raw data to a reliable entity file instead of just exporting labels.
acceptedAnswer.description: Ask for a sample, schema draft, validation plan, and examples of entity resolution.

description: Ask for a sample, schema draft, validation plan, and examples of entity resolution.
